=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/schemaNumber_preview.ts(7,15): warning TS377098: This Schema number API accepts `NaN`, `Infinity`, and `-Infinity`. Use `Schema.Finite` for finite domain numbers. If non-finite values are intentional, disable this diagnostic for that line. effect(schemaNumber)
/.src/schemaNumber_preview.ts(8,17): warning TS377098: This Schema number API accepts `NaN`, `Infinity`, and `-Infinity`. Use `Schema.FiniteFromString` for finite domain numbers. If non-finite values are intentional, disable this diagnostic for that line. effect(schemaNumber)


==== /.src/schemaNumber_preview.ts (2 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics schemaNumber:warning
    
    import { Schema } from "effect"
    
    export const User = Schema.Struct({
      age: Schema.Number,
                  ~~~
!!! warning TS377098: This Schema number API accepts `NaN`, `Infinity`, and `-Infinity`. Use `Schema.Finite` for finite domain numbers. If non-finite values are intentional, disable this diagnostic for that line. effect(schemaNumber)
